sources.title: The Fast and the Furious, 1955 film with John Ireland and Dorothy Malone
sources.channelName: Public Domain Movies - Classic Old Movies

sources.title: The Fast and the Furious (colorized) (1954, crime, imdb score: 5.3)
sources.description: The Fast and the Furious is a 1954 American crime drama B movie starring John Ireland and Dorothy Malone , co-directed by Ireland and Edward Sampson. It was the first film produced for the American Releasing Corporation , and the second feature produced by Roger Corman .

metadata.Plot: Los Angeles street racer Dominic Toretto falls under the suspicion of the LAPD as a string of high-speed electronics truck robberies rocks the area. Brian O'Connor, an officer of the LAPD, joins the ranks of Toretto's highly skilled racing crew undercover to convict Toretto. However, O'Connor finds himself both enamored with this new world and in love with Toretto's sister, Mia. As a rival racing crew gains strength, O'Connor must decide where his loyalty really lies.
metadata.Writer: Ken Li, Gary Scott Thompson, Erik Bergquist
metadata.Actors: Vin Diesel, Paul Walker, Michelle Rodriguez
